summary: Added a raw X API debugging escape hatch that reuses the generated client's auth, dry-run, retry, masking, and error-classification behavior.
reason: The generated endpoint surface covers normal workflows, but debugging newly exposed X endpoints and auth-lane failures needs a constrained raw request path without falling back to ad hoc curl commands that bypass CLI diagnostics and credential masking.
validated_outcome: go test ./... covers raw command registration, query params, body sources, auth-sensitive header rejection, HTTPS-only absolute URLs, host allowlisting, cookie-auth dry-runs, classified API errors, dry-run secret redaction, redirect downgrade refusal, and public-action dry-run inference; strict SKILL.md verification passes.
